name: Van Genechten Packaging N.V. 3.25% SUB NTS 06/07/2024 EUR1000
summary: Van Genechten Packaging N.V. 3.25% SUB NTS 06/07/2024 EUR1000 is a bond issued by Van Genechten Packaging, a European packaging company. The bond is a subordinated note with a fixed interest rate and a maturity date of July 6, 2024. Van Genechten Packaging is based in Belgium.
